title: TC4 jar/tube interaction parity batch
implemented: JarTubeInteractionRuntime keeps original NBT names AspectFilter/Aspect/Amount/facing explicit
JarLabelItem and EssentiaJarBlock now set/clear jar AspectFilter from stored aspect or filled phial
EssentiaTubeBlock accepts jar-label/phial interactions to set or clear tube AspectFilter
Tube filter interactions use existing EssentiaTubeBlockEntity.setAspectFilter and subtype renderer state
Void jar behavior remains preserving overflow destruction semantics from earlier stages
forge_1_19_2_adapters: Label aspect selection uses filled phial/offhand context because 1.19.2 has no original 1.7.10 metadata label item UI path
Tube filter set/clear is a block-use adapter until exact wand/label packet flow is finalized
